title: neighbor_monitor.rs: evict_stale uses retain() which is O(n) per call
description:
NeighborTxLog::evict_stale() uses Vec::retain() which is O(n) for the timestamp list. This is called on every record_rx() and check_neighbor_duty() call. For high-traffic neighbors this could add up. Consider using a ring buffer with explicit head/tail tracking for O(1) eviction.

File: rust/lichen-core/src/neighbor_monitor.rs lines 58-61
